zh.lifeSummary: 當Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd於大約0980年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin32歲，母親Gwenllian Ferch Einion25歲。他和Jane ferch Brochwell of Powys至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1066年在威爾士享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd于大约0980年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin32岁，母亲Gwenllian Ferch Einion25岁。他和Jane ferch Brochwell of Powys至少有6个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1066年在威尔士享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Cadwgon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from Old Welsh cad ‘battle’ + gwogawn ‘glory, distinction’, or ‘honour’; the name of several Welsh princes in the early Middle Ages and of two characters mentioned in the Mabinogi.

variants.name: Cadogan
meanings: Anglicized form of   Cadwgan .  It was revived in the 19th century, perhaps in part as a transferred use of the surname.

variants.name: Cadwgawn
meanings: Traditional: from Old Welsh cad ‘battle’ + gwogawn ‘glory, distinction’, or ‘honour’; the name of several Welsh princes in the early Middle Ages and of two characters mentioned in the Mabinogi.

en.lifeSummary: When Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd was born about 0980, in Wales, his father, Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin, was 32 and his mother, Gwenllian Ferch Einion, was 25. He had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with Jane ferch Brochwell of Powys. He died in 1066, in Wales, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd est né environ 0980, à Galles, son père, Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian Ferch Einion, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec Jane ferch Brochwell of Powys. Il est décédé en 1066, à Galles, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd um 0980 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin 32 und seine Mutter Gwenllian Ferch Einion 25. Er hatte mit Jane ferch Brochwell of Powys mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1066 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd è nato il circa 0980 nel Galles, il suo padre, Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian Ferch Einion, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con Jane ferch Brochwell of Powys. Morì nel 1066, nel Galles, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodryddが約0980年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelinは32歳，母Gwenllian Ferch Einionは25歳であった。彼はJane ferch Brochwell of Powysとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1066年にウェールズで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd(이)가 대략 0980년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian Ferch Einion(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Jane ferch Brochwell of Powys(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1066년 웨일스에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd nasceu aproximadamente 0980, em Gales, seu pai, Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian Ferch Einion, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com Jane ferch Brochwell of Powys. Ele faleceu em 1066, em Gales, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd родился около 0980 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian Ferch Einion, 25. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от Jane ferch Brochwell of Powys. Он умер в 1066 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd nació aproximadamente 0980, en Gales, su papá, Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Gwenllian Ferch Einion, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas con Jane ferch Brochwell of Powys. Murió en 1066, en Gales, a la edad de 87 años.
